summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a late‑1995 show highlighted by Hornsby's guest appearance and standout performances of Unbroken Chain, Fire on the Mountain and a soaring Corrina > Matilda sequence.
review: The recording is a crisp, well‑mixed soundboard that lets the band’s late‑year energy shine through.  Hornsby’s surprise cameo lifts the second set, delivering memorable versions of Unbroken Chain, Fire on the Mountain, Days Between and an epic Corrina > Matilda segue, while Jerry’s playing shows flashes of his classic tone despite occasional lyric slips.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4‑5 stars and praise both performance and soundboard quality; only one low‑star review focuses on Jerry’s health, so overall rating is strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Consistently described as crisp, great mix and high‑fidelity; no significant dropouts or balance issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows seamlessly with Hornsby‑fuelled jams and a fluid Corrina > Matilda → Days sequence; overall pacing praised as one of the best of 1995.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mixed remarks – some note lyric slips and weakened vocals, but several reviewers highlight his strong guitar work on Unbroken Chain and other jams.
band_member_comments.Keys: Hornsby’s piano/keys cameo is repeatedly called a spark that lifts the entire performance.
